members.name: EditorPreviewIndeterminate
members.summary: If [code]false[/code], the [member indeterminate] animation will be paused in the editor.

members.name: FillMode
members.summary: The fill direction. See [enum FillMode] for possible values.

members.name: Indeterminate
members.summary: When set to [code]true[/code], the progress bar indicates that something is happening with an animation, but does not show the fill percentage or value.

members.name: ShowPercentage
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the fill percentage is displayed on the bar.

values.name: FILL_BEGIN_TO_END
values.summary: The progress bar fills from begin to end horizontally, according to the language direction. If [method Control.is_layout_rtl] returns [code]false[/code], it fills from left to right, and if it returns [code]true[/code], it fills from right to left.

values.name: FILL_BOTTOM_TO_TOP
values.summary: The progress fills from bottom to top.

values.name: FILL_END_TO_BEGIN
values.summary: The progress bar fills from end to begin horizontally, according to the language direction. If [method Control.is_layout_rtl] returns [code]false[/code], it fills from right to left, and if it returns [code]true[/code], it fills from left to right.

values.name: FILL_TOP_TO_BOTTOM
values.summary: The progress fills from top to bottom.

constants.name: FILL_BEGIN_TO_END
constants.summary: The progress bar fills from begin to end horizontally, according to the language direction. If [method Control.is_layout_rtl] returns [code]false[/code], it fills from left to right, and if it returns [code]true[/code], it fills from right to left.

constants.name: FILL_END_TO_BEGIN
constants.summary: The progress bar fills from end to begin horizontally, according to the language direction. If [method Control.is_layout_rtl] returns [code]false[/code], it fills from right to left, and if it returns [code]true[/code], it fills from left to right.

constants.name: FILL_TOP_TO_BOTTOM
constants.summary: The progress fills from top to bottom.

constants.name: FILL_BOTTOM_TO_TOP
constants.summary: The progress fills from bottom to top.
